rows.notes: Adopted gpt-5-mini; it correctly included the period in the description. Both extractors agreed on type and absence of amounts.
Adopted gpt-5-mini; it correctly included the period in the description. Both extractors agreed on type and absence of amounts.
Consensus reached between both extractors for all values and description.
Adopted gpt-5-mini's description 'Library Account' as it better matches the handwriting and the 'L.CS.' abbreviation. Amounts were in consensus.

Adopted gpt-5-mini's description 'Library Account' (consistent with previous row). Amounts were in consensus: £5952, 0 shillings, 4 pence. The '. 4' notation in the ledger's outer column is interpreted as 0 shillings and 4 pence, as explained by gemini-flash, due to column alignment.
Consensus reached between both extractors for all values and description.
Adopted gemini-flash's pounds value (£6011) after visual verification. The digit in question is clearly a '0', not a '5'. Description, shillings, and pence were in consensus.
Adopted 'Investments' for description. Amounts (£9571, s14, d2) were in consensus, read from the outer columns.
Consensus reached between both extractors for all values and description.

Adopted gemini-flash's amounts (£13, s4, d0) after visual verification. The numbers '13 4 .' are clearly separated into pounds, shillings, and pence by the ledger's vertical lines. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '134' as pounds.

Adopted gpt-5-mini's description 'Tithes' after visual verification. The initial letter is a stylized 'T', and 'Tithes' fits the context of college income better than 'Richer' or 'Fither'. Amounts were in consensus.
Consensus reached between both extractors for all values and description.
Consensus reached between both extractors for all values and description.
Consensus reached between both extractors for all values and description.
Adopted gpt-5-mini's blank description as there is no text in the description column for this subtotal. Amounts (£484, s3, d7) were in consensus.
Adopted gemini-flash's description 'How Exhibition Funds' as the 's' is visible. Amounts were in consensus.
Consensus reached between both extractors for all values and description.
Adopted gpt-5-mini's description 'Lorcombe Richards Fund' after visual verification; 'Lorcombie' is incorrect. Amounts were in consensus.

Adopted gemini-flash's amounts (£54, s1, d7) and its note regarding the extra '6' digit. Visual verification confirms '54' in pounds, '1' in shillings, and '7' in pence, with a '6' following the '7' that does not represent a standard fraction. gpt-5-mini incorrectly interpreted column alignment.

rows.description: I certify that the Accounts of the College are duly kept in proper books of account & that the Abstracts and Balance Sheet contain a full & true account of the financial condition of the College.
rows.notes: Adopted gpt-5-mini's transcription for its accurate capitalization of key nouns and the ampersand. Overrode row_type to 'entry' as it's a specific statement/record, not a general section header.
Adopted gemini-flash's row segmentation. Visually verified description to include 'th'. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this line with the auditor's name.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction. Visual verification confirms the name and qualification 'F.C.A.'. gpt-5-mini failed to extract this as a distinct row.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction. Visual verification confirms the firm name. gpt-5-mini failed to extract this row.
Adopted gemini-flash's extraction. Visual verification confirms the address. gpt-5-mini failed to extract this row.
Adopted gpt-5-mini's blank description, as no text appears in the description column next to the grand total. Amounts were in consensus.
